---
title: "Henry Martin Gibbs"
---

## Henry Martin Gibbs

**Dates:** (1850-1928)

### Description

of Barrow Court

### Biography

Fourth son of William and Blanche Gibbs, he married (1882) Emily Anna Otter (d. 1928). [PB 1948]  He was CMY’s second cousin once removed.

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 18th [1889]
- Letter from Jany 17th 1872

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
